name: The Other Mother/The Beldam
description:
The Other Mother/Beldam is a creature that cunningly lures unsuspecting souls into her mirror world, weaving an illusion of a perfect world tailored to their deepest desires. Through deceptive charm, she entices, manipulates, and ultimately consumes the spirits of those who fall under her enchanting facade, feeding her dark power with their essence. Her goal is to lure, ensnare and drain her victims of their essence, to feed her twisted soul

[Art Credit: Incase (?) ]
